default.name: Usman Ayobami
default.summary: Product-focused software engineer with strong fundamentals in algorithms, data structures, and full-stack web development. 2+ years of experience building and shipping features using React, TypeScript, Node.js, and Postgres. Comfortable working across the stack, debugging production issues, and owning features end-to-end in fast-paced, high-stakes environments.
default.title: Software Engineer

experience.title: Software Engineering Intern
bullets: Built patient-facing and internal features using React, TypeScript, GraphQL, and Node.js.
Designed and shipped insurance-verification flows that reduced clinic workload by 40%.
Delivered a Next.js-based file upload interface with OCR extraction and real-time validation.
Used AI tools (Cursor, GPT-based refactoring) to accelerate development and improve quality.

experience.title: Software Engineer – Open Source Contributor
bullets: Created a cross-platform meeting detection engine with a hybrid signal system.
Integrated Rust bindings with napi-rs and exposed a clean TypeScript API.
Published as a npm package with full documentation and real-world adoption.

experience.title: Graduate Research Assistant
bullets: Built interactive dashboards using React and Python for carbon sequestration research.
Improved large dataset querying speed by 30% with optimized data pipelines.

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Developed scalable front-end systems with TypeScript, Redux, and CSS.
Contributed to business-aligned, production-ready software solutions.

experience.title: Web Developer
bullets: Built responsive web and mobile apps using React Native, JavaScript, and MongoDB.
Collaborated on REST API integrations and frontend architecture.

projects.name: HealthDisparity AI
bullets: Built an AI assistant recommending culturally competent care using React, Node.js, OpenAI.

bullets: Developed a reliable AI pipeline to extract structured data from PDFs using Python, Rust, and OCR.
